features.name: fighter-fighting-style

features.name: fighter-second-wind
features.recovery: Regain all expended uses on a Short or Long Rest.

grants_actions.name: fighter-second-wind
grants_actions.summary: Catch your breath and restore a meaningful chunk of staying power without surrendering your whole turn.
